---
pagetitle: "Subpage template — GET REHDY"
description: "Starter template for a GET REHDY subpage. Write plain markdown; the nav header and footer are added automatically."
---

<!--
  SUBPAGE TEMPLATE
  ----------------
  This file lives in _templates/, so Quarto does NOT render it (paths starting
  with "_" are ignored). To start a new page, copy it to the project root:

      cp _templates/subpage-template.qmd about.qmd

  Then `quarto render` writes docs/about.html. Everything below is ordinary
  markdown — the GET REHDY nav header (header.png) and footer (footer.png) are
  injected automatically on every page via _quarto.yml, and
  assets/css/get-rehdy.css provides the look.

  Wrap page content in a `.gr-section` (padding) + `.section-inner` (max-width)
  so it lines up with the rest of the site. Use fenced divs ( ::: {.class} )
  only when you want a styled component; plain prose needs no markup.
-->

:::::: {.gr-section}
::::: {.section-inner}
:::: {.section-label}
Subpage template
::::

## A subpage written in plain markdown

Everything on this page is authored in markdown. The dark nav bar at the top and
the GET REHDY footer at the bottom are shared site chrome — you never copy them
into a page, they come from `_includes/header.html` and `_includes/footer.html`.

You can use normal markdown freely: **bold**, *italic*, [links](index.html),
lists, and so on. When you want one of the GET REHDY components, reach for a
fenced div:

:::: {.gr-callout}
**Tip:** the same stylesheet powers this page and the landing page, so any
component from `index.qmd` (cards, splits, the layer-cake, flow steps, pillars)
works here too.
::::

:::: {.card-grid .grid-2}
::: {.card .card-teal}
### Reuse the components
Drop in a `.card`, `.split`, `.flow`, or `.insight` and it is styled instantly.
:::

::: {.card .card-navy}
### Keep writing markdown
For ordinary content, just write prose — no HTML, no boilerplate.
:::
::::

:::: {.insight}
Delete this template's content and start writing. The header and footer stay put.
::::
:::::
::::::
